title: spananthe peruviana
intro: Spananthe peruviana, also known as Peruvian angel's trumpet or Peruvian jasmine, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. It is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, prized for its fragrant white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Spananthe peruviana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
